name: HIM F300B 0.4 nozzle
machine_start_gcode:
; MMU参数传递
MMU_START_SETUP INITIAL_TOOL={initial_tool} TOTAL_TOOLCHANGES=!total_toolchanges! REFERENCED_TOOLS=!referenced_tools! TOOL_COLORS=!colors! TOOL_TEMPS=!temperatures! TOOL_MATERIALS=!materials! FILAMENT_NAMES=!filament_names! PURGE_VOLUMES=!purge_volumes!
; 优先开始初始层
M104 S150
M140 S[bed_temperature_initial_layer_single]
; MMU状态检测
MMU_START_CHECK
; 调平等打印初始化动作
PRINT_START EXTUDER_TEMP=[nozzle_temperature_initial_layer] BED_TEMP=[bed_temperature_initial_layer_single] Chamber=[chamber_temperature] PRINT_MIN={first_layer_print_min[0]},{first_layer_print_min[1]} PRINT_MAX={first_layer_print_max[0]},{first_layer_print_max[1]} MESH_MIN={adaptive_bed_mesh_min[0]},{adaptive_bed_mesh_min[1]} MESH_MAX={adaptive_bed_mesh_max[0]},{adaptive_bed_mesh_max[1]} MESH_ALGO=[bed_mesh_algo] PROBE_COUNT={bed_mesh_probe_count[0]},{bed_mesh_probe_count[1]}
; 加载材料
MMU_START_LOAD_INITIAL_TOOL
; 打印擦嘴动作
M83
G1 X10.0 Y5.0 Z0.8 F18000;Move to start position
M109 S{nozzle_temperature_initial_layer[initial_extruder]}
G1 Z0.2
G0 E2 F300
G0 X275 E15 F{outer_wall_volumetric_speed/(0.3*0.5)     * 60}
G0 Y16 E0.700 F{outer_wall_volumetric_speed/(0.3*0.5)/ 4 * 60}
G0 X274.5
G0 E0.2
G0 Y5.5 E0.700
G0 X10 E15 F{outer_wall_volumetric_speed/(0.3*0.5)     * 60}
M400
; 开始打印
SET_PRINT_STATS_INFO TOTAL_LAYER={total_layer_count}
layer_change_gcode:
;AFTER_LAYER_CHANGE
;[layer_z]
; --打印层变更Gcode--
_MMU_UPDATE_HEIGHT
SET_PRINT_STATS_INFO CURRENT_LAYER={layer_num} ; For pause at layer functionality and better print stats
